headline: Is BXP Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: BXP faces Q1 revenue and FFO declines ahead of its April 28 report, as strong office demand and leasing gains clash with rising costs and competitive pressures.

headline: Countdown to Ventas (VTR) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Estimates Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Ventas (VTR), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.
